data.title: Methanex Corporation declares a quarterly dividend of US$0.185 per share, payable on September 30, 2025.
data.description: Today, Methanex Corporation (TSX:MX) (Nasdaq:MEOH) from Vancouver, British Columbia, disclosed a quarterly dividend of US$0.185 per share. This dividend, approved by the Board of Directors, is set to be distributed on September 30, 2025, to shareholders of record as of September 16, 2025.

data.title: UL Solutions and Fujitsu collaborate to aid Japanese firms comply with climate reporting standards using ULTRUS software.
data.description: Northbrook, Illinois - UL Solutions (NYSE: ULS), a prominent figure in applied safety science worldwide, has announced a partnership with Fujitsu, a renowned Japanese multinational enterprise offering IT services, solutions, and technology. The collaboration aims to support Japanese firms in complying with Japan's recently introduced climate reporting guidelines. This venture leverages UL Solutions' ULTRUS software suite, a comprehensive digital tool intended to simplify regulatory, supply chain, and sustainability processes.

data.title: L3Harris Technologies (NYSE: LHX) declares $1.20 quarterly dividend, payable on Sept. 22 to shareholders. Trusted Disruptor in defense industry.
data.description: L3Harris Technologies, a trusted disruptor in the defense industry, has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $1.20 per common share. The dividend is payable on Sept. 22, 2025, to shareholders of record as of Sept. 5, 2025. L3Harris Technologies focuses on delivering end-to-end technology solutions for mission-critical needs across space, air, and land sectors.

data.title: Waller supports July rate cut; urges Fed to act before job market weakens. #economy #interestrates
data.description: Christopher Waller, who is being considered for the position of the next chair of the central bank, stated that the Federal Reserve should not delay in lowering interest rates until the labor market shows signs of deterioration.

data.title: Crypto theft hits $2.17B in 2025, incl. $1.5B ByBit hack – Chainalysis reports. Alarming rise in cybercrime.
data.description: The year 2025 has seen a surge in crypto-related crimes, with an alarming total of $2.17 billion stolen up to now. The largest incident involves a $1.5 billion hack on ByBit, as reported by Chainalysis.

data.title: Encore Search Partners recognized as a top executive recruiting firm by Houston Business Journal for 2025.
data.description: Houston-based executive recruiting firm, Encore Search Partners, has surpassed larger competitors in the industry with their high-impact placements and a performance-driven culture. As of July 17, 2025, the firm has achieved a top position on the Houston Business Journal's list of Largest Executive Search Firms. This recognition highlights their success and growth in the market, showcasing their effectiveness in connecting top talent with leading companies in the region. This achievement underscores their commitment to excellence and signifies their prominent presence in the executive search sector.
